title: Olfersia apoda

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. Bioactive constituents of Olfersia apoda include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
